prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约4715→4852→4075→3901→3538，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约537名；2025年基准约3538名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为89、89、88、87、87人，基本稳定在87–89人区间；2026年计划大幅扩招至103人，较2025年增加约18.4%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争 有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名2021年第17→2022年第16→2023年第15→2024年第13→2025年第16→2026年第15，近年稳定在全国前15–17名，属 于顶尖工科强校；2021年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件），2023年偏负面（师德师风事件），但均为较早年份事件，近年未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度为较热（总 排名第31），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有18个A-/A/A+学科，其中建筑学A+、土木工程A+、交通运输工程A+、电子 科学与技术A+、生物医学工程A+等5个A+学科，以及计算机科学与技术A-、信息与通信工程A等，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、 电气工程、计算机类等东南大学优势专业大类在2024年均为高热推荐/推荐状态，社会热度持续偏高；本省物理类考生2021年约14.7万→2025年约25.0万，持续增长，2026年估算约 25.1万，增幅约0.5%，竞争基数扩大但幅度有限；省控线（物理类本科批）2021年397→2025年426，整体小幅上升；东南大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市 群，对湖北考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3538、2026年大幅扩招约18.4%对竞争的缓解作用、本省物理类 考生小幅增长约0.5%、学校顶尖工科层次及优势专业持续高热对报考的吸引力，扩招效应略占主导，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大）；预测最低位次约38 78名，区间3413–4343名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能系统）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与电气工程）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3413–4343名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如3400名以内）可重点冲击吴健雄班、计算机类等一 档专业；位次接近区间上限（如4300名左右）建议以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4715 → 4852 → 4075 → 3901 → 3538, showing a fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 537 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 3538; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 89, 89, 88, 87, 87 respectively, basically stable in the 87–89 range; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 103 students, an increase of about 18.4% compared to 2025, a notable expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking from 2021 17th → 2022 16th → 2023 15th → 2024 13th → 2025 16th → 2026 15th, stable in the national top 15–17 in recent years, belonging to top engineering strong schools; 2021 reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incident), 2023 slightly negative (teacher ethics incident), but both are earlier incidents, no obvious negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (total ranking 31), short video exposure is medium to high, application attention is acceptable; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; has 18 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Architecture A+, Civil Engineering A+, Transportation Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Biomedical Engineering A+ and other 5 A+ disciplines, as well as Computer Science and Technology A-, Information and Communication Engineering A, etc., strong engineering strength, strong attraction to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and other advantageous major categories of Southeast University were all in high heat recommendation/recommended status in 2024, social heat continues to be high; provincial Physics Category candidates from about 147,000 in 2021 to about 250,000 in 2025, continuous growth, estimated about 251,000 in 2026, an increase of about 0.5%, the competition base expands but limited; provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) from 397 in 2021 to 426 in 2025, overall slight increase; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, belonging to the Yangtze River Delta core city cluster, with strong regional attraction for Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 3538, the significant expansion of about 18.4% in 2026 alleviating competition, the slight increase of about 0.5% in provincial Physics Category candidates, the school's top engineering level and advantageous majors' sustained high heat attracting applications, the expansion effect slightly dominates, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 3878, range 3413–4343.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, Physics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Intelligent Construction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Material Science and Ecology; Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Engineering, etc.)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3413–4343, it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 3400), focus on impacting Tier 1 majors like Wu Jianxiong Class and Computer Science; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 4300), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking stable within national top 15–17, a top comprehensive university; Law A-, somewhat related to History Category admission major (Labor and Social Security); university overall engineering advantage prominent, few liberal arts programs; recent reputation generally stable, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity relatively hot (overall ranking 31), with some attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining 2025 baseline ranking 1275, enrollment plan unchanged for three consecutive years, provincial History Category examinees continuing to grow about 13.8% intensifying competition, high university level but very few liberal arts admissions, etc., it is predicted that 2026 minimum ranking will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (ranking number increases); predicted minimum ranking approximately 1305, range 1148–1462.
